# DefendableRouter · AI context manifest
#
# Last updated: 2026-05-26
# Generated for https://defendablerouter.com/

> DefendableRouter is currently a public positioning and local source
> demonstration surface. Public deployed router middleware is not yet
> independently verified. DefendableCloud integration is not yet proven.
> Field integration remains pending.

## Current status
- FIELD INTEGRATION PENDING
- NOT_YET_INTEGRATED
- PUBLIC DEPLOYED ROUTER UTILITY NOT VERIFIED
- LOCAL SOURCE DEMO ONLY

## What is public today
- public site: https://defendablerouter.com/
- public source repo: https://github.com/SudoSuOps/defendable-router
- public docs status pages: https://defendabledocs.com/defendablerouter/overview/
- public audit tape: https://github.com/SudoSuOps/defendableos-tribunal-audit

## What is not proven today
- deployed public router middleware utility
- Cloud demo integration path
- receipt creation for every routed public call
- public write-only behavior or latency guarantees
- ENS-signed receipts or reconciliation deeds on a public deployed surface
- insurance, carrier-ready evidence, production clearance, or external SaaS enforcement

## Local source note
The repository contains local source-level receipt-spine work under
`spine/`. That is source material for inspection and local build work,
not proof of a publicly verified deployed Router utility.

## Cloud relationship
The accepted live DefendableCloud demo is a server-side synthetic Pages
Functions flow. Router is not currently proven to be in that path.

## Hash limitation
SHA-256 evidence in this prototype establishes content-integrity linkage
only. It does not independently prove authorship, owner approval,
trusted timestamping, immutability, blockchain anchoring, certification,
insurance coverage, production clearance, or external platform
enforcement.

- DefendableCloud demo · [defendablecloud.com/agent-operations-demo](https://defendablecloud.com/agent-operations-demo)
- DefendableDocs field release · [defendabledocs.com/field-release/overview/](https://defendabledocs.com/field-release/overview/)
